challenge.explanation: Pronađi red gde Alice spominje deadline i na ekranu nežno pita klijenta šta da uradi. Tamo ćeš pronaći tačan odgovor na ovo pitanje.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Baada ya kuzungumza na James, Alice aliandika barua pepe kwa mteja. Hapa ni maudhui yake:

Subject: Request for Updated Project Requirements and New Timeline

Dear David,

I hope you're doing well.

I wanted to reach out to confirm the new project requirements following our recent discussions. We've made some adjustments to the timeline due to recent changes and need to ensure we're aligned on the updated requirements before proceeding.

We're proposing a new deadline for the first phase of the project at the end of next month. Please let us know if this works for you or if there are any additional adjustments we should consider.

Additionally, James has sent me the updated project plan, which I've attached to this email for your review. Please take a look and let us know if everything looks good on your end.

Looking forward to your confirmation and any further input you may have.

Best regards,

Alice

Alice anataka kujua nini kuhusu tarehe ya mwisho iliyopendekezwa?

answers.feedback: Iako Alice pita da li rok odgovara klijentu, glavni fokus je potvrditi da li se poklapa sa njihovim rasporedom.
Alisa ne zahteva određeno vreme za potvrdu, već samo da se utvrdi da li predloženi rok odgovara klijentu.
Wakati Alice anauliza kama tarehe ya mwisho iliyopendekezwa inafaa, haulizi hasa kama mteja ana "furaha" nayo.

challenge.title: Vežba 40
